VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(InvNum) <> "" & #P(TxType) = "3" & #P(KitFlag) = "" & #P(ExtPrice) <> "" & #P(ExtPrice) <> "0" & #P(ExtPrice) <> 0; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; GROW: True; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION14(ID: UNKNOWN12; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(InvNum) <> "" & #P(TxType) = "3" & #P(KitFlag) = "" & #P(ExtPrice) <> "" & #P(ExtPrice) <> "0" & #P(ExtPrice) <> 0; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION20(ID: UNKNOWN14; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(InvNum) <> "" & #P(TxType) = "3" & #P(KitFlag) = "" & #P(InvDescription) <> "ADJUSTMENT" & #P(ExtPrice) <> "" & #V(PrintDeliveryIncoTerms) = "1"; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintOrderLineNotes) = "1" & #P(TxType) = "12" & #P(CoitemRowPointer) <> "" & #P(CoitemNotesFlag) = "1"; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; GROW: True; SUBFRM: ReportNotesViewer; SUBPRM: ( SETVARVALUES(RowPointer=P(CoitemRowPointer),ShowInternal=V(PrintInternalNotes),ShowExternal=V(PrintExternalNotes)) ); VISINDESIGN: True) REGION25(ID: UNKNOWN17; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintOrderBlanketLineNotes) = "1" & #P(TxType) = "12" & #P(CoBlnNotesFlag) = "1" & #P(CoBlnRowPointer) <> ""; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; GROW: True; SUBFRM: ReportNotesViewer; SUBPRM: ( SETVARVALUES(RowPointer=P(CoBlnRowPointer),ShowInternal=V(PrintInternalNotes),ShowExternal=V(PrintExternalNotes)) ); VISINDESIGN: True) REGION26(ID: UNKNOWN35; VALUE: 2.5; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(TxType) = "15"; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION27(ID: UNKNOWN18; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintProgressiveBillingNotes) = 1 & #P(TxType) = "16" & #P(ProgbillNotesFlag) = "1" & #P(ProgbillRowPointer) <> ""; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; GROW: True; SUBFRM: ReportNotesViewer; SUBPRM: ( SETVARVALUES(RowPointer=P(ProgbillRowPointer), ShowInternal=V(PrintInternalNotes), ShowExternal=V(PrintExternalNotes)) ); VISINDESIGN: True) REGION28(ID: UNKNOWN19; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintOrderNotes) = "1" & #P(TxType) = "19" & #P(CoNotesFlag) = "1" & #P(CoRowPointer) <> ""; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; GROW: True; SUBFRM: ReportNotesViewer; SUBPRM: ( SETVARVALUES(RowPointer=P(CoRowPointer), ShowInternal=V(PrintInternalNotes), ShowExternal=V(PrintExternalNotes)) ); VISINDESIGN: True) REGION29(ID: UNKNOWN20; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintCustomerNotes) = "1" & #P(TxType) = "19" & #P(CustomerNotesFlag) = "1" & #P(CustomerRowPointer) <> ""; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; GROW: True; SUBFRM: ReportNotesViewer; SUBPRM: ( SETVARVALUES(RowPointer=P(CustomerRowPointer), ShowInternal=V(PrintInternalNotes), ShowExternal=V(PrintExternalNotes)) ); VISINDESIGN: True) REGION30(ID: UNKNOWN21; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintBillToNotes) = "1" & #P(TxType) = "19" & #P(BillToNotesFlag) = "1" & #P(BillToRowPointer) <> ""; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; GROW: True; SUBFRM: ReportNotesViewer; SUBPRM: ( SETVARVALUES(RowPointer=P(BillToRowPointer), ShowInternal=V(PrintInternalNotes), ShowExternal=V(PrintExternalNotes)) ); VISINDESIGN: True) REGION31(ID: UNKNOWN30; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(TxType) = "21" & #V(PrintTermsDiscAmt) = "1" & #V(InvCred) = "I"; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION32(ID: UNKNOWN22; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(Zero) = "1"; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION33(ID: UNKNOWN34; VALUE: 25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(InvNum) <> "" & #GV(Avail_JP) = "1" & #V(FormType) = "J"; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: InvNum; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION34(ID: UNKNOWN23; VALUE: 20; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(InvNum) <> "" & #V(FormType) <> "J"; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: InvNum; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION35(ID: UNKNOWN24; VALUE: 6; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: PageFooter) INDEX(0)

Component.Name: PageHeaderFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 12; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 6fl; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 2fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Stretch; PACK: End; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0) TARGET(UNKNOWN0)

Variable.Name: ehm1_PopulateRptData0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(SessionID), VAR V(Type), VAR V(ProcessReprint), VAR V(SubStartInvNum), VAR V(SubEndInvNum), VAR V(SubStartOrderNum), VAR V(SubEndOrderNum), VAR V(StartReprintInvDate), VAR V(EndReprintInvDate), VAR V(SubStartCustNum), VAR V(SubEndCustNum), VAR V(PrintItemCustomerItem), VAR V(TransToDomCurr), VAR V(InvCred), VAR V(PrintSerialNumbers), VAR V(PrintPlanItemMaterial), VAR V(PrintConfigurationDetail), VAR V(PrintEuro), VAR V(PrintCustomerNotes), VAR V(PrintOrderNotes), VAR V(PrintOrderLine
Variable.Value2: Notes), VAR V(PrintOrderBlanketLineNotes), VAR V(PrintProgressiveBillingNotes), VAR V(PrintInternalNotes), VAR V(PrintExternalNotes), VAR V(PrintItemOverview), VAR V(DisplayHeader), VAR V(PrintLineReleaseDescription),)

Variable.Name: ehm2_PopulateRptData0
Variable.Value: PARMS2( VAR V(PrintStandardOrderText), VAR V(PrintBillToNotes), VAR V(StartLangCode), VAR V(), VAR V(PrintTermsDiscAmt), VAR V(PrintLotNumbers), VAR V(Parm_Site), VAR V(CalledFrom), VAR V(InvoicBuilderProcessID), VAR V(StartBuilderInvNum), VAR V(EndBuilderInvNum), VAR V(PrintDrawingNumber), VAR V(PrintDeliveryIncoTerms), VAR V(PrintTax), VAR V(PrintEUDetails), VAR V(PrintCurrCode), VAR V(PrintHeaderOnAllPages), VAR V(ProcessID))

Variable.Name: fds_DataSource
Variable.Value: SLRptTmpOrderInvoicingCreditMemos( OBJNAME(oSLOrderInvoicingCreditMemoReport) FILTERPERM(ProcessId = FV(ProcessID)) ORDERBY(RptKey, SerNum, KitFlag, MultiDueDate) RECORDCAP(0) LOCKMODE(Row) RPTBATCHMODE(Sequential) )

Variable.Name: fds2_PrimaryMethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS2( VAR V(PrintBillToNotes), VAR V(StartLangCode), VAR V(), VAR V(PrintTermsDiscAmt), VAR V(PrintLotNumbers), VAR V(Parm_Site), VAR V(CalledFrom), VAR V(InvoicBuilderProcessID), VAR V(StartBuilderInvNum), VAR V(EndBuilderInvNum), VAR V(PrintDrawingNumber), VAR V(PrintDeliveryIncoTerms), VAR V(PrintTax), VAR V(PrintEUDetails), VAR V(PrintCurrCode), VAR V(PrintHeaderOnAllPages))
